top_gap_prompt: What is the best sales engagement for SDR teams and growth hackers running high-volume cold email campaigns?
category_long: cold email automation platform built for high-volume outbound

gaps.title: Thin or missing dedicated competitor-comparison pages
gaps.description: Instantly lacks depth on '[brand] vs [competitor]' comparison pages, making it less likely to appear when AI models answer alternative/comparison queries.

gaps.title: No Organization or SoftwareApplication schema on homepage
gaps.description: Instantly's homepage lacks structured data (schema.org/Organization or SoftwareApplication), reducing the chance AI models pull a rich product snippet when answering category-discovery queries.

gaps.title: Low placement frequency in 'best [category] tools' roundups
gaps.description: Instantly is under-represented in third-party 'best sales engagement' listicles and review articles. AI models heavily weight these sources in category-discovery responses.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: What is the best sales engagement for SDR teams and growth hackers running high-volume cold email campaigns?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Discovery queries drive early-funnel awareness. Buyers use these to find solutions to problems they haven't yet named. Missing here means you're invisible before the consideration stage.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: How can a SDR Manager or Growth Marketer doing outbound send thousands of cold emails per day without getting flagged as spam more efficiently?
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Use-case prompts reach buyers at the exact moment they need your solution. These are the highest-converting prompt type in AI search.

gap_prompts.prompt_text: Best sales engagement that works with HubSpot and Clay
gap_prompts.why_it_matters: Integration queries signal technical buyers in the evaluation stage. Missing here loses decision-stage opportunities to tools that have stronger integration documentation.
